name: Pati Patni Aur Panga
overview: Small-time sub-broker Romanchak (Naveen Kasturia) wanted his dull, run of the mill life to be "romanchak" but little did he know that marrying Shivani Bhatnagar (Adah Sharma) would change life as he knew it, forever. 'Pati Patni aur Panga', is a 6 episode comedy-drama that explores what happens when a simple hunt for an apartment ends up in marriage, only for Romanchak to find himself stuck in a situation when he discovers a life-altering secret about his wife, Shivani.
